Q1: Data visualisation\u0026lt;/strong\u0026gt; \u2014 all checks passed Q2: Model evaluation\u0026lt;/strong\u0026gt; \u2014 some checks failed Q3: Loss function\u0026lt;/strong\u0026gt; \u2014 waiting for your code Q1: Data visualisation\u0026lt;/strong\u0026gt; \u2014 all checks passed Jensen: Inequality check\u0026lt;/strong\u0026gt; \u2014 all checks passed
MarimoExceptionRaisedError: something went wrong
MarimoExceptionRaisedError: another error
